title: FLUIwID
description: Don't like being solid? Be water instead!
body: Are you tired of your earthly form? Are there annoying gaps nearby which you can't fit through? Don't worry, we've all been there. Luckily this mod adds the Potion of Water. Simply brew one with an awkward potion and a bucket of water. Your character will be instantly replaced with a blob of pure H₂O, with a fluid simulation to match. Benefits include being immune to most forms of damage (swords don't tend to do much against water) and being able to fit through most gaps. Downsides are that you're a blob of water that piles roughly onto the location you want to be. Hope you like water! [](https://modfest.net/1.20)
